Openapi_instance_listInstances.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
Openapi_instance_listInstances.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default is 1000
Openapi_instance_listInstances.showRdmaTopo: Whether to retrieve RDMA high-performance network topology information
Openapi_instance_listInstances.instanceIds: Multiple instance IDs, comma-separated, up to 100 supported
Openapi_instance_listInstances.instanceNames: Multiple instance names, comma-separated, exact match, up to 100 supported
Openapi_instance_listInstances.fuzzyInstanceName: Instance name supporting fuzzy keyword search. Mutually exclusive with instanceNames; passing both will result in an error
Openapi_instance_listInstances.volumeIds: Multiple volume IDs, comma-separated, up to 100 supported
Openapi_instance_listInstances.deploySetIds: Multiple deploy set IDs, comma-separated, up to 100 supported
Openapi_instance_listInstances.securityGroupIds: Multiple security group IDs, comma-separated, up to 100 supported
Openapi_instance_listInstances.status: Instance status (Recycled / Running / Stopped / Stopping / Starting)
Openapi_instance_listInstances.tags: Multiple tags, comma-separated, format: tagKey:tagValue or tagKey
Openapi_instance_listInstances.vpcId: VPC ID, can only be used in combination with the privateIps query parameter
Openapi_instance_listInstances.privateIps: Multiple private IP addresses, comma-separated, up to 100 supported, must be used together with vpcId
